name: The Watcher's Pursuit
short_description: You’ve uncovered dangerous secrets, and now the corporation you work for is hunting you down. Survive the night, monitor camera's and find a solution to the problem. Trust no one. Stay sharp. Your life depends on it.
detailed_description:
You've uncovered classified information, and now the shadowy corporation you work for is coming after you. They're ready to eliminate you to protect their secrets. You have one night to survive, evade capture, and find a way out. Every decision could be your last. Trust no one. Stay sharp. Your life depends on it.

Play your way

You can choose your own path and set the stage for how hard you want the game to be. Whether you're a seasoned horror enthusiast or new to the genre, "The Watcher's presuit" offers a range of difficulties to suit your playstyle.

- Easy: Enemies give you plenty of time to react to break-ins.
- Medium: A balanced experience with a fair mix of tension and horror.
- Hard: Only for the bravest souls, this mode will test your survival skills to the limit.

Depending on the difficulty setting, enemies will exhibit different behaviors. For instance, on easy mode, enemies will knock politely on your door, while on hard mode, they will forcefully break it down in seconds.
